title: Theme: Food and Dining
description: Vocabulary for restaurants, cooking, and food.

sentences.spanish: Quisiera reservar una mesa para dos personas para esta noche.
sentences.english: I would like to reserve a table for two people for tonight.

sentences.spanish: ¿Podría ver el menú de vinos, por favor?
sentences.english: Could I see the wine menu, please?

sentences.spanish: El plato del día es pescado fresco con verduras al vapor.
sentences.english: The dish of the day is fresh fish with steamed vegetables.

sentences.spanish: Soy alérgico a los nueces, ¿este postre lleva frutos secos?
sentences.english: I am allergic to nuts, does this dessert contain dried fruits/nuts?

sentences.spanish: Para empezar, vamos a compartir una ensalada mixta.
sentences.english: To start, we are going to share a mixed salad.

sentences.spanish: La sopa está un poco salada para mi gusto.
sentences.english: The soup is a little salty for my taste.

sentences.spanish: ¿Nos puede traer la cuenta cuando pueda?
sentences.english: Can you bring us the bill when you can?

sentences.spanish: Me encanta cocinar comida italiana los fines de semana.
sentences.english: I love cooking Italian food on the weekends.

sentences.spanish: Necesitamos comprar más aceite de oliva y ajo.
sentences.english: We need to buy more olive oil and garlic.

mesa.mnemonic: A 'mesa' (flat-topped hill) — flat like a table.
